profile_backed_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/ --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10
profile_backed_target.route: After repeated rejected GEMM B-pack/layout families, pivot to the profile-backed top non-GEMM linalg row under frankenjax-p1vbf.

lever.summary: pinv_svd now transposes the already-computed row-major U once into column-major scratch before reconstruction, so each singular vector is read contiguously inside the existing l/i/j update order.
lever.alien_primitive: data-layout / loop-nest locality transformation for numerical linear algebra

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5 --sample-size 10

after.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5 --sample-size 10

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: one_sided_jacobi_svd_real still uses the same Jacobi pair order, row iteration order, V accumulation, singular-value total_cmp sorting, and rcond cutoff. pinv_svd result updates still run l outer, i middle, j inner.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Singular-value sorting and all zero-value skips are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each U scalar is copied unchanged from u[j*k+l] to u_cols[l*m+j]. The update remains result[i*m+j] += (v[i*n+l] * (1/sigma[l])) * U[j,l], so the multiplication/addition sequence per result element is identical.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: Empty-shape behavior, rcond NaN cutoff behavior, dtype/shape/error behavior, and low-rank QR fallback boundaries are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.nan_surface: NaN/signed-zero handling follows the same SVD factors and the same reconstruction arithmetic.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.result: failed on pre-existing unrelated linalg.rs formatting outside this pass; no whole-file formatting was applied
exit 1 for pre-existing file-wide inventory; UBS fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections were clean and no unsafe blocks were reported

fallback: If a future pinv parity regression appears, revert this commit to restore row-major U reads in pinv_svd reconstruction.
next_profile_note: Re-profile fj-lax linalg after landing because pinv_256x128 reconstruction cost changed.
